decision_context_summary: The governing directive (83fd7cad-f74c-4657-a228-68ca3bc6eacc) mandates the review of Hestami AI Real Property OS specifications and preparation for the Implementation Phase. System boundaries currently include Property Asset Ingestion (Images & 3D Splats) and AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching as defined in agent outputs (e5d3918b-7aec-4729-a658-17ed7895e178). Non-functional requirements specify Bun-based API performance thresholds for the 'AI Agent' discovery experience (91d11032-040f-4ad5-a396-4cbf06692482). Phase gate evaluations are active to assess these components (d778a8b2-8625-45a1-a1c2-3964f955903c).

open_questions.question: Vector index coverage remains at 0% for 66 items, potentially limiting semantic similarity search accuracy for AI Agent discovery.

completeness_narrative: Findings confirm the MVP scope and system boundaries under the governing directive (83fd7cad-f74c-4657-a228-68ca3bc6eacc) and e5d3918b-7aec-4729-a658-17ed7895e178. However, the vector index coverage is incomplete (0/66), which creates a gap in the semantic data available for agent discovery as noted in the phase gate evaluation (d778a8b2-8625-45a1-a1c2-3964f955903c).
